title: macstate
description: Snapshot of macOS system signals exposed by the `macstate` CLI.

constrained.description: True when the path is on a Low Data Mode network (NWPath.isConstrained).

expensive.description: True when the path is on an expensive interface such as cellular or a personal hotspot (NWPath.isExpensive).

Interface.description: Primary interface kind reported by NWPathMonitor for the current path. `other` is reported when the path uses none of the well-known kinds (e.g. unknown VPN).

battery_percent.description: Battery charge as an integer percentage (0–100), or null when no battery is present (e.g. Mac mini, iMac).

low_power_mode.description: Whether Low Power Mode is currently active (NSProcessInfo.isLowPowerModeEnabled). This is the runtime state, not a configured preference.

PowerSource.description: Whether the system is currently drawing from AC or battery (IOPSGetProvidingPowerSourceType).

EnergyMode.description: Configured energy preference for the current power source, read from IOPM active preferences (the same data source pmset(8) uses). `high` is only available on Apple Silicon Pro/Max. `unknown` is returned when the preference is unreadable or carries an unrecognized value.
